heading: Rules and regulations for administration of Ouachita National Forest; violations; penalties
label: 693a Rules and regulations for administration of Ouachita National Forest; violations; penalties
text: The Secretary of Agriculture shall execute the provisions of this section and , and he is authorized to prescribe all general rules and regulations for the administration of such game sanctuaries and refuges, and violation of such rules and regulations shall be punished by fine of not more than $500 or imprisonment for not more than six months or both.section 693 of this title
